/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libimss_shared.so -o libimss_shared.so CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/imss.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/comms.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/redis.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/workers.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/hercules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/policies.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/directory.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/records.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/map_ep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/slog.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/map_server_eps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_shared.dir/__/src/shared_memory.c.o   -L/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app: -lglib-2.0 -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucs.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
